message:
test(proptest): add 38 property-based tests for degradation ladder classifier (ft-3vpr9)

Covers evaluate_resize_degradation_ladder invariants: tier classification
correctness (FullQuality/QualityReduced/CorrectnessGuarded/EmergencyCompatibility),
rank monotonicity, assessment field consistency, serde roundtrips, warning_line
behavior, quality_reductions/correctness_guards/availability_changes cumulative
monotonicity, determinism, and tier ordering properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
